// src/neuro_tensor.rs
use std::sync::Arc;
use tokio::sync::RwLock;
use uuid::Uuid;
use rand::Rng;
use std::time::Duration;

// --- CONFIG ---
const GROWTH_THRESHOLD: f64 = 0.005; // Sensitivity for Neurogenesis
const ATROPHY_THRESHOLD: f64 = 0.00001; // Sensitivity for Pruning
const LEARNING_RATE: f64 = 0.1;

// --- CORE STRUCTURES ---

pub struct DimensionalBarrier;
impl DimensionalBarrier {
    pub fn calculate_variance(data: &[f64]) -> f64 {
        if data.is_empty() { return 0.0; }
        let mean = data.iter().sum::<f64>() / data.len() as f64;
        data.iter().map(|x| (x - mean).powi(2)).sum::<f64>() / data.len() as f64
    }
}

pub struct NeuroFluxTensor {
    pub id: String,
    // Hot Data is the active neural weights
    pub weights: RwLock<Vec<f64>>, 
    pub shape: RwLock<usize>,
}

impl NeuroFluxTensor {
    pub fn new(initial_size: usize) -> Arc<Self> {
        Arc::new(Self {
            id: Uuid::new_v4().to_string(),
            weights: RwLock::new(vec![0.01; initial_size]), // Initialize with small weights
            shape: RwLock::new(initial_size),
        })
    }

    /// ENHANCEMENT: Oja's Rule for Hebbian Learning
    /// Prevents unbounded weight growth by normalizing against the output squared.
    /// Formula: dw = LearningRate * (Output * Input - Output^2 * Weight)
    pub async fn inject_stimulus(&self, inputs: Vec<f64>) {
        let mut weights = self.weights.write().await;
        
        // 1. Calculate Neuron Output (Activation) - Sigmoid
        // Dot Product of Input * Weights
        let dot_product: f64 = weights.iter().zip(&inputs).map(|(w, i)| w * i).sum();
        let output = 1.0 / (1.0 + (-dot_product).exp()); // Sigmoid activation

        // 2. Update Weights using Oja's Rule
        for (i, input) in inputs.iter().enumerate().take(weights.len()) {
            let w = weights[i];
            // Oja's Rule term: (y * x) - (y^2 * w)
            let delta = LEARNING_RATE * (output * input - (output * output * w));
            weights[i] += delta;
        }
        
        println!("[Cortex] Hebbian update complete. Activation Output: {:.4}", output);
    }
}

// --- AGENTIC CORE (SPECIALIZED) ---

pub struct NeuroTrinity {
    tensor: Arc<NeuroFluxTensor>,
}

impl NeuroTrinity {
    pub fn new(tensor: Arc<NeuroFluxTensor>) -> Self {
        Self { tensor }
    }

    pub async fn run_lifecycle(&self) {
        let tensor = self.tensor.clone();
        
        // 1. RESEARCHER: Monitors Variance
        let w = tensor.weights.read().await;
        let variance = DimensionalBarrier::calculate_variance(&w);
        drop(w); // Release lock

        println!("[NeuroTrinity] Variance Analysis: {:.6}", variance);

        // 2. BUILDER: Pruning or Neurogenesis
        if variance < ATROPHY_THRESHOLD {
            self.prune().await;
        } else if variance > GROWTH_THRESHOLD {
            self.neurogenesis().await;
        } else {
            println!("[NeuroTrinity] State: Stable Homeostasis.");
        }
    }

    async fn prune(&self) {
        let mut w = self.tensor.weights.write().await;
        let mut s = self.tensor.shape.write().await;
        
        let current_size = w.len();
        if current_size <= 10 { return; } // Minimal survival size

        let prune_amount = (current_size as f64 * 0.1).ceil() as usize; 
        w.truncate(current_size - prune_amount);
        *s = w.len();
        
        println!("[Builder] ✂️ SYNAPTIC PRUNING: Removed {} neurons. New Size: {}", prune_amount, *s);
    }

    async fn neurogenesis(&self) {
        let mut w = self.tensor.weights.write().await;
        let mut s = self.tensor.shape.write().await;
        
        let current_size = w.len();
        let growth_amount = (current_size as f64 * 0.1).ceil() as usize; 
        
        let mut rng = rand::thread_rng();
        for _ in 0..growth_amount {
            w.push(rng.gen_range(0.001..0.01)); // New neurons start weak
        }
        *s = w.len();

        println!("[Builder] 🌱 NEUROGENESIS: Grown {} neurons. New Size: {}", growth_amount, *s);
    }
}

// --- MAIN EXECUTION ---

#[tokio::main]
async fn main() {
    println!("=== STANDALONE NEUROPLASTICITY TENSOR (OJA'S RULE) ===");
    let tensor = NeuroFluxTensor::new(100);
    let trinity = NeuroTrinity::new(tensor.clone());

    // Scenario 1: High Stimulus (Stress)
    println!("\n--- Phase 1: High Stimulus (Stress) ---");
    // Inject massive values to spike variance via Oja's rule
    tensor.inject_stimulus(vec![10.0; 100]).await; 
    tensor.inject_stimulus(vec![10.0; 100]).await; 
    trinity.run_lifecycle().await;

    // Scenario 2: Atrophy (Disuse)
    println!("\n--- Phase 2: Disuse (Atrophy) ---");
    // Manually reset weights to near zero to simulate time passing/decay
    {
        let mut w = tensor.weights.write().await;
        *w = vec![0.000001; *tensor.shape.read().await];
    }
    trinity.run_lifecycle().await;
}
